faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about LoksewaHub
faq.a1: LoksewaHub is Nepal's most comprehensive platform for government exam preparation, offering notices, syllabus, notes, old questions, AI-powered tools, and mock tests for Loksewa, TSC, Banking, and other government exams.
faq.a2: Yes, LoksewaHub offers a free tier with access to basic features including public notices, syllabus overview, and limited practice questions. Premium features are available through our Basic and Premium plans.
faq.q3: How do I access old questions?
faq.a3: Old questions are available in the Old Questions section. Free users have limited access, while Basic and Premium subscribers can access the full collection with answer explanations and AI-powered analysis.
faq.a4: LoksewaHub covers all major Nepali government exams including Loksewa (general administration, finance, engineering, health, agriculture), Teacher Service Commission (TSC), Nepal Bank, Rastra Bank, and other public service commission exams.
faq.q5: How does the AI Tutor work?
faq.a5: The AI Tutor uses advanced AI to answer your questions in both English and Nepali. You can ask about any exam topic and get detailed explanations, practice questions, and study guidance tailored to your needs.
faq.q6: Can I upload my own notes?
faq.a6: Yes, registered users can upload their own study notes to share with the community. All uploads are reviewed to ensure quality and relevance to Nepali government exams.
faq.q7: How accurate are the AI question predictions?
faq.a7: Our AI predictions are based on analysis of past exam papers, current trends, and syllabus patterns. While highly accurate, they should be used as a supplement to comprehensive study rather than a sole preparation source.
faq.a8: Yes, LoksewaHub is fully responsive and works on all devices. A dedicated mobile app is also available for iOS and Android for a seamless learning experience on the go.

about.title: About LoksewaHub
about.subtitle: Empowering Nepal's future civil servants with cutting-edge exam preparation tools
about.missionDesc: To democratize government exam preparation in Nepal by providing free and affordable access to high-quality study materials, AI-powered tools, and a supportive learning community.
about.visionDesc: To become Nepal's most trusted and innovative exam preparation platform, helping thousands of students achieve their dreams of serving the nation through government careers.
about.value1Desc: We believe quality education should be accessible to every Nepali student, regardless of their location or economic background.
about.value2Desc: We leverage cutting-edge AI technology to provide personalized learning experiences and smart study tools.
about.value3Desc: We ensure all our content is accurate, up-to-date, and aligned with official exam patterns and syllabi.
about.value4Desc: We foster a collaborative learning environment where students can share knowledge and support each other.

footer.description: Nepal's comprehensive platform for government exam preparation
